calendar.matters:
Amended Notice Of Hearing Re: Petition Of Erik Nelson To Perpetuate Testimony Of Norman Nelson By Videotaped Deposition
Off Calendar Sep-15-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES Via CourtCall:
Andrew Chew of BRAYTON & PURCELL LLP (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiff, Erik Nelson.
Daniel S. Hurwitz of WILSON ELSER MOSKOWITZ EDELMAN & DICKER LLP (213-443-5100 x.8764), appearing for Defendants, Toshiba International Corporation.
Cindy J. Vivanco of BERKES CRANE SANTANA & SPANGLER LLP (213-955-1150 x.1199) appearing for Defendants, Likiber Inc.
Irene Lee of CANNATA, O'TOOLE, FICKES & OLSON LLP (415-409-8900) appearing for Defendant, Likiber.
Randall K. Bernard of HAWKINS PARNELL & YOUNG (415-766-3200) specially appearing for defendant, Brass Craft Manufacturing Company.
Rob Toby of DEMLER, ARMSTRONG & ROWLAND, LLP (415-949-1900), specially appearing for defendant, Cal Steam.

RULING:
Hearing Held. Argued regarding proof of service on Ferguson Enterprises. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONER ERIK NELSON's petition To Perpetuate Testimony Of Norman Nelson By Videotaped Deposition is GRANTED. Deposition to be held via zoom/remote within 30 days of the date of order. All parties are to file a special notice of appearance within 2 court days upon receipt of order.

Order signed in open court.

Judge: Cynthia Ming-mei Lee, Clerk: S. Le. Not reported. (503/CML)

Notice Of Hearing Re: Petition Of Erik Nelson To Perpetuate Testimony Of Norman Nelson By Videotaped Deposition
Off Calendar Aug-18-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, not contested and tentative ruling adopted: The Petition of Erik Nelson to Perpetuate Testimony of Norman Nelson by Videotaped Deposition is off calendar. Amended notice of the new hearing date for September 15, 2022 filed. Judge: Cynthia Ming-mei Lee, Clerk: A. Mok. Not reported. (503/CML)
